reasons: localized structured lineage route and global navigation
Public Content Envelope lineage dataset interface
reviewed relationship assertion semantics and uncertainty states

reproducibility.detail: GitHub Actions completed the pinned default Release Gate from clean Linux and Windows checkouts for implementation commit abf3a85; both jobs passed and uploaded immutable reports with recorded SHA-256 digests.

static_correctness.detail: Web lint, TypeScript typecheck, production build and release-gate ownership and trust checks pass locally and in Linux and Windows clean checkouts.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29561279925 Linux and Windows default gates: PASS

public_contracts.detail: The localized lineage route uses canonical URL state for focus, ancestor depth, descendant depth and selected relationship; invalid values normalize by permanent redirect; the legacy route redirects by request language while preserving task state.

media_and_content_truth.detail: Parents, children, ancestors, descendants and siblings are computed from reviewed parentage assertions rather than father_id or mother_id fields; assertion paths preserve confirmed, tentative, disputed and superseded semantics, source IDs and dependency-profile availability.
evidence: Bao Li tentative father journey: PASS

browser_journeys.detail: The complete 42-test browser suite passes locally, in clean-checkout CI and against the immutable Staging deployment; it covers graph-free structured relationships, URL normalization, relation selection, bilingual state preservation, native keyboard controls, no-JavaScript rendering, trusted profile continuation, existing Atlas/profile journeys and map behavior.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29561279925 Linux and Windows browser checks: PASS

automated_accessibility.detail: Chinese and English structured lineage pages pass desktop and 320-pixel mobile axe WCAG A/AA scans, keyboard-native scope controls, no-horizontal-overflow checks and reduced-motion verification locally, in CI and against Staging.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29561279925 Linux and Windows automated core WCAG checks: PASS

visual_regression.detail: The immutable Slice 4 Staging deployment is bound to this implementation, but a named semantic visual review of the bilingual lineage journey is not yet recorded.

performance_budgets.detail: The production and Cloudflare builds report 107 kB First Load JS for the localized structured lineage route, below the structured public-route budget of 170 KiB.

staging.detail: Implementation commit abf3a85 is bound to an immutable Cloudflare frontend Version ID and bundle checksum, and the complete browser and automated accessibility suites pass against the deployed Staging URL.
evidence: Staging browser suite 42/42 PASS; automated accessibility suite 20/20 PASS

human_signoff.detail: Named product-owner review of bilingual relationship wording, uncertainty states, source paths, mobile reflow and URL sharing is not yet recorded for Slice 4.

release_decision.detail: Clean-checkout automation and immutable Staging verification are complete for implementation commit abf3a85, but named semantic visual and product-owner review remain incomplete. This manifest must not be interpreted as release GO.
